## Meeting Purpose

[Transition GrowthX's hapily support from Britton to Ben and clarify Luma integration.](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Support Transition:** Britton is handing off as primary contact to Ben Francis, hapily's Director of Customer Success, who will be the long-term resource for reporting and advanced use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [**Integration Gap:** GrowthX's Luma registration data is not syncing to HubSpot, blocking event attribution. This is because the previous setup was incomplete after the original implementer (Kyle) departed.](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [**Solution Path:** A 3-part Zapier integration is required to sync Luma data to hapily's custom objects in HubSpot. This is a GrowthX-owned build, as hapily does not offer direct Luma integration.](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [**Core Use Case:** GrowthX will use hapily as a backend system of record for post-event analysis and deal attribution, while Luma remains the front-end registration tool.](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Incomplete Luma → HubSpot Integration

  - [The previous setup, built by Kyle, was incomplete, leaving Luma registration data unsynced to HubSpot.](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [This prevents GrowthX from using hapily for its primary goal: event attribution and ROI reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [The team's focus is on using hapily as a backend system of record, not for its native registration pages.](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)

### Solution: 3-Part Zapier Integration

  - [A 3-part Zapier integration is required to sync Luma data to hapily's custom objects in HubSpot.](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [**Part 1: Event Sync**](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
      - [**Trigger:** New event in Luma.](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
      - [**Action:** Create/update `Event` object in HubSpot.](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
  - [**Part 2: Registrant Creation**](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
      - [**Trigger:** New registration in Luma.](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
      - [**Action:**](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
        1.  [Find the corresponding `Event` object in HubSpot (match by event name).](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
        2.  [Get the HubSpot `record ID` for that event.](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
        3.  [Update the registrant's HubSpot `Contact` record by populating a specific webhook property with the event's `record ID`.](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
        4.  [This action automatically triggers hapily to create the `Registrant` object, linking the contact to the event instance.](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [**Part 3: Status Updates**](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
      - [**Trigger:** Status change in Luma (e.g., registered → attended).](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
      - [**Action:**](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
        1.  [Find the specific `Registrant` object in HubSpot (match by email AND event name).](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
        2.  [Update the `status` property on that `Registrant` record.](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [**Status Mapping:** GrowthX must map Luma statuses (e.g., "approved," "waitlisted") to hapily's standard statuses ("registered," "attended," "canceled").](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)

### hapily's Data Model & Attribution

  - [hapily's data model enables granular tracking and reporting:](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
      - [**`Event`:** The event itself.](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**`Contact`:** The individual.](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**`Registrant`:** The crucial link object. It represents a specific contact's registration for a specific event, storing status and attendance data.](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
      - [**`Session`:** A child object of `Event` for tracking attendance at individual sessions within a larger event (e.g., a conference).](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
  - [**Deal Attribution:** The `Deal Attribution` workflow automatically links deals to events based on registrant status (e.g., "attended"), a defined look-back window, and optional filters (e.g., pipeline, deal owner).](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)

### Support & Roadmap

  - [**Support Channels:** Ben will provide asynchronous support via Loom videos and email. Direct Slack channels are avoided to manage support expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)
  - [**Luma Integration:** Ben acknowledged Luma's growing popularity and confirmed it's on hapily's roadmap for a potential direct integration to simplify the setup process.](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason:** Build the 3-part Zapier integration to sync Luma data to HubSpot.](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)
  - [**Jason:** Map Luma's registration statuses to hapily's standard statuses.](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
  - [**GrowthX Team:** Test the new integration with an upcoming event next week.](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=1735.0)
  - [**Britton:** Schedule a follow-up working session to review the integration and resolve any issues.](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=1889.0)
  - [**Ben:** Serve as the long-term hapily contact for GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/EoCNq8HSrQounnbfEK2TbTp7WT4syhg7?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
